title: Tangy Flaky Canadian Squash Pie
description: A quick, Mediterraneanfriendly pie with slowcooked butternut squash, tangy lemonvinegar sauce, and buttery flaky pastry.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200 °C (400 °F) and lightly oil a 9‑inch pie dish.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent, about 3–4 minutes.
Add cubed butternut squash, thyme, salt, and pepper; cook for 5 minutes until slightly softened.
Stir in lemon juice, maple syrup, and apple cider vinegar; cook for another 2 minutes letting flavors meld. Remove from heat and let sit 2 minutes.
Roll out puff pastry to fit the dish. Press into the dish, trimming any excess edges.
Evenly spoon the squash filling into the crust, smoothing the top.
Sprinkle grated parmesan over the filling if desired.
Bake for 25–30 minutes until pastry is golden brown and the squash is fully tender.
Let the pie cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
